name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Mix in the sour cream until combined.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and baking soda to the mixture. Mix just until combined.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
7. Spread the batter evenly in a greased and floured Bundt pan.
8. Sprinkle the topping made from sugar, cinnamon, and nuts over the batter.
9. Dot the top with small pieces of butter.
10. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
